jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MedPlus
jsonLd.description:
MedPlus is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
